docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CAPRICORN TRAVEL AS TO DEFENDANT BAYAWA JESSIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
